title: LLMCad: Fast and Scalable On-device Large Language Model Inference

methodology.key_technique: Compute-IO pipeline for speculative token generation
methodology.core_idea: Delegate most tokens to smaller real-time LLM that fits in device memory
methodology.observation: Smaller LLMs can correctly generate most easy tokens (determiners, pronouns, punctuations)

results.performance: Achieves token generation speeds up to 9.3× faster than existing inference engines
results.problem_addressed: Memory wall causing 59-224× lengthened inference latency when models are too large for device memory
results.contribution: Breaks memory wall through model collaboration

key_findings.scaling_law: Challenged on mobile devices due to memory constraints
